vocab.meaning: sự thay đổi mang tính bước ngoặt (trong tư duy/lý thuyết)
vocab.example: I am eager to study how renewable energy can create a paradigm shift in our global economy.
If I had the opportunity, I would specialize in cognitive development to better understand how children acquire language.
My ambition is to conduct pioneering research in the field of sustainable architecture.
I hope to study public policy so that I can help bridge the gap between scientific discovery and government legislation.

vocab.meaning: một môn học/lĩnh vực ngách (rất chuyên biệt)
vocab.example: I’ve always wanted to explore a niche subject like ethnomusicology to understand the link between music and culture.

vocab.meaning: quá trình học hỏi đầy khó khăn, thử thách
vocab.example: Astrophysics definitely has a steep learning curve, but I find the challenge incredibly stimulating.

vocab.meaning: chuyên về một lĩnh vực nào đó
vocab.example: I would love to specialize in restorative justice to help improve our legal systems.

vocab.meaning: nền tảng lý thuyết/cơ sở lý luận
vocab.example: Understanding the theoretical underpinnings of social media is essential for anyone studying modern sociology.

vocab.meaning: kinh nghiệm thực hành thực tế
vocab.example: Rather than just reading textbooks, I wish to gain hands-on experience in marine biology through field research.

vocab.meaning: sự thăng tiến trong sự nghiệp
vocab.example: Studying an MBA would be a strategic move for my career advancement in the corporate world.
